creator: sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

  I've made some modifications. Please review them. The changes include:
  - Rename check: to regression-test: which is used by tinderbox
  - use PLIST_FILES instead of PLIST
  - Use <bsd.port.mk>
  Thanks.

Best regards,
sunpoet

--- libsigsegv.patch begins here ---
Index: Makefile
=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=
=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=
=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D
RCS file: /home/ncvs/ports/devel/libsigsegv/Makefile,v
retrieving revision 1.15
diff -u -r1.15 Makefile
--- Makefile	4 Dec 2010 07:31:18 -0000	1.15
+++ Makefile	25 Dec 2010 19:37:58 -0000
@@ -6,10 +6,9 @@
 #
=20
 PORTNAME=3D	libsigsegv
-PORTVERSION=3D	2.8
+PORTVERSION=3D	2.9
 CATEGORIES=3D	devel
-MASTER_SITES=3D	${MASTER_SITE_GNU}
-MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=3D	libsigsegv
+MASTER_SITES=3D	GNU/libsigsegv
=20
 MAINTAINER=3D	gaod@hychen.org
 COMMENT=3D	Handling page faults in user mode
@@ -17,12 +16,16 @@
 USE_AUTOTOOLS=3D	libtool
 USE_LDCONFIG=3D	yes
=20
-.include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
+PLIST_FILES=3D	include/sigsegv.h \
+		lib/libsigsegv.a \
+		lib/libsigsegv.la \
+		lib/libsigsegv.so.2 \
+		lib/libsigsegv.so
=20
 post-install:
 	@${CAT} ${PKGMESSAGE}
=20
-check: build
+regression-test: build
 	@cd ${WRKSRC} && ${SETENV} ${MAKE_ENV} ${MAKE} ${MAKE_FLAGS} ${MAKEFILE} =
${MAKE_ARGS} check
=20
-.include <bsd.port.post.mk>
+.include <bsd.port.mk>
